emails.subject: FW: Office Locations
emails.body: FW: Office Locations Is this the office I selected? Please confirm.

emails.subject: RE: Office Locations
emails.body: RE: Office Locations Yes...you picked 06102...I will get your things from down stairs. Looks like they are ready to move in the attorneys now. Tjae

emails.subject: RE: Office Locations
emails.body: If I picked 6102, why am I getting 6103?

emails.subject: RE: Office Locations
emails.body: I cleaned out your office today and have you set up in 6102...who is telling you 6103? I also put in the request to move everything else as well. Do I need to call Tammy?

emails.subject: RE: Office Locations
emails.body: 6103 is on the original e-mail from tammy shephard.
